Paid campaign recommendation.

Route orchestration software is the product. Enterprise logistics is the market.

The locale is US. Markets include Canada and United States. Verticals include Retail and Third-party logistics. Company sizes are 1000+.

Titles are VP Logistics and Director of Transportation. Functions are Operations and Supply Chain. Seniority is Director and VP.

Search terms are route optimization and last mile logistics. Problems are manual dispatch exceptions and high cost-to-serve. Buying triggers are SLA pressure and mixed fleet complexity.

Goal is Pipeline creation. Channels are linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
